hero.titlePost: One Portal. Two Ways to Scale.
hero.subText: CloudWA bridges the gap. Connect officially via Meta's secure cloud API with 0% message markup, or use our high-speed, cost-effective web automation gateway.
hero.adviserBtn: 💡 Not sure? Take our 10-second pathfinder test
hero.officialAudience: Best for registered brands & large volume (100% ban-free)
hero.unofficialAudience: Best for startups, individuals & developers (Fixed price, no documents)

problem.title: Stop Losing Customers to Sudden WhatsApp Bans
problem.subtitle: Using basic web automation APIs carries a risk of number bans if used improperly. Using standard WhatsApp limits your scaling capabilities.

cards.title: Sudden Number Bans
cards.desc: Years of customer relationships and histories deleted by Meta overnight with zero warnings.

cards.title: Multi-Agent Bottlenecks
cards.desc: Limited to just a couple of agents. While competitors handle hundreds of conversations at once.

cards.title: The Scale Anxiety
cards.desc: As your client database grows, your fear of getting flagged increases, limiting your marketing.

cards.title: Hidden Commission Markups
cards.desc: Other platforms charge an additional margin on top of official Meta template message pricing.

solution.title: We Hold the Stick from the Middle
solution.subtitle: You don't have to choose between high costs and high ban risks. We offer both paths in one dashboard.

official.title: Official Meta API Portal
official.desc: Best for established brands, CRM integrations, and 100% compliant bulk notifications.
bullets: Direct integration with Shopify, WooCommerce, ERPs

unofficial.title: Budget Web Gateway
unofficial.desc: Best for startups, local stores, developers, and low-budget transaction alerts.

wizard.title: Which WhatsApp API is Right for You?
wizard.subtitle: Answer these 3 simple questions and let our dynamic wizard recommend the perfect path for your business.

questions.text: Do you have official business documents (e.g., Commercial Register)?

options.text: Yes, I have registered business documents
No, I am an individual / unregistered brand

questions.text: What is your estimated monthly messaging volume?
What is your preferred budget and cost structure?

options.text: Pay per message (Meta rates) + Fixed system subscription

official.title: Official WhatsApp Cloud API
official.desc: Since you have business registration documents and value 100% stability with high volumes, the Official API is the perfect match. You pay official Meta rates directly with 0% extra commission from CloudWA.

unofficial.title: Budget Web Gateway
unofficial.desc: For quick setups, individual sellers, or businesses preferring a flat yearly fee without per-message Meta charges, our Budget Web Gateway fits perfectly.

pricing.title: Transparent Plans for Both Paths
pricing.subtitle: Choose the package that aligns with your scale and business requirements.

developer.title: Built For Developers
developer.subtitle: Integrate WhatsApp into your tech stack within minutes. Switch between Official and Web Automation endpoints.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We have official, transparent answers.

questions.q: Q1: Do I need to pay extra fees to Meta on top of the $35 subscription?
questions.a: Yes. Meta charges an official cost for template messages which varies by country. We pass this cost directly to you at 0% commission/markup from our end. Incoming client messages and your answers within 24 hours are 100% free.

questions.q: Q2: Can my WhatsApp number get banned while using CloudWA?
questions.a: If you use the Official WhatsApp API, there is ZERO risk of number bans, as it is fully authorized by Meta. If you use the Web Automation API, there is a risk if you send spam, but we provide safety tools (delays, custom templates) to minimize the risk.

questions.q: Q3: How does the official verification process work?
questions.a: After registration, our technical team at Aquadic will schedule a WhatsApp session or call to walk you through linking your Facebook Business Manager and setting up your official Meta WhatsApp account step-by-step.

questions.q: Q4: Is technical support really human-centered?
questions.a: Absolutely. Backed by Aquadic, you speak to real human engineers based in Egypt who understand local markets and speak your language directly, rather than waiting for auto-response support tickets.

questions.q: Q5: Can I integrate CloudWA with custom CRM or ERP systems?
questions.a: Yes. We support custom webhooks, a robust Developer API, and full integration with automation platforms like n8n, Shopify, and WooCommerce. If you need bespoke custom development, Aquadic can build it for you.
